name: bch-ns-indexer
description: BCH Name Service indexer - scans blockchain for BCNS registrations and serves a REST API

scripts.test: export KOA_ENV=test && export NAME_SUFFIX=bch && mocha --exit --timeout 15000 --recursive test/
scripts.test:coverage: export KOA_ENV=test && export NAME_SUFFIX=bch && nyc --reporter=text mocha --exit --timeout 15000 --recursive test/
